prompt:
A calibration log sheet for a strip-based pH kit laid on a bench beside neutral sample cups and reference strips, with lighting notes and recorded checks implied by highlighted sections and pen marks. The setup should clearly read as a reproducibility and calibration artifact rather than a generic notebook page.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future lab aesthetic: soft overhead lighting, realistic paper, pen, and strip textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the sheet centered and uncluttered so it works clearly as a DSPACE QA artifact.
